name: qxp-desktop-tests
description: End-to-end tests for the qxp desktop app. Drives the Svelte SPA via Playwright + Chromium against a real qxp-web daemon.

scripts._comment_node_options: DEP0205 silenced because Playwright's bundled TS loader still calls module.register() (deprecated on Node 22). Targets ONE warning code, not all warnings. Remove this prefix once Playwright migrates to module.registerHooks() — track upstream and verify by running `playwright test` without it.
